summary: Comprehensive testing of Request Stock 3-step flow migration. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All 16 frontend features tested and working correctly. The canonical request-sources → request-catalog → request flow is fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: RequestStockForm.jsx correctly implements 3-step flow with proper data-testid attributes
api.js correctly implements requestSources, requestCatalog, requestStock functions
Source picker correctly shows relation labels (Direct Parent, Upstream Central, Sibling)
Blocked sources correctly show (blocked) indicator and cross-branch warning
seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Request Stock 3-step flow fully tested and working. Backend APIs: request-sources, request-catalog, request all return correct data. Frontend correctly displays sources with relation labels and blocked indicators. Submit creates transfer and navigates to transfer detail.

backend_api_tests.5_sibling_blocked_indicator: PASS - Central user's sibling has can_submit_request=false
backend_api_tests.6_catalog_returns_items: PASS - Items have source_inventory_master_id, stock_title, unit, available_display_qty
backend_api_tests.7_catalog_from_different_source: PASS - Can fetch catalog from upstream master
backend_api_tests.8_submit_valid_request: PASS - Creates transfer with type=request, status=requested

frontend_ui_tests.1_login_franchise_user: PASS - Redirects to Operations Hub with DemoFranchise4 context
frontend_ui_tests.2_navigate_to_request_new: PASS - Request Stock form loads with source picker
frontend_ui_tests.3_source_picker_shows_3_sources: PASS - Shows DemoCentral2 (Direct Parent), My Genie (Upstream Central), DemoCentral1 (Sibling)
frontend_ui_tests.4_catalog_items_display: PASS - Shows stock_title, unit, available_display_qty (e.g., 'Cooking Oil (ltr) — 1 avail')
frontend_ui_tests.5_select_item_and_quantity: PASS - Item selection populates unit, quantity input works
frontend_ui_tests.7_login_central_user: PASS - Shows DemoCentral1 as Master Store
frontend_ui_tests.10_cross_branch_warning: PASS - Warning message displayed when blocked source selected

api_contracts_verified.POST /api/proxy/v2/inventory-transfer/re: Returns sources[] with restaurant_id, name, relation, can_submit_request, is_direct_parent
Returns items[] with source_inventory_master_id, stock_title, unit, available_display_qty
Creates transfer with type=request, status=requested, returns transfer_id
